subcodes.first_line: Glory be unto Thee, O Lord my God! I beseech Thee by Thy Word through which Thou hast made all things manifest and hast given life unto all creation
subcodes.first_line_orig: سبحانک اللهم یا الهی اسئلک بکلمتک التی بها اظهرت الممکنات و احییت الموجودات
subcodes.subjects: @prayer for spiritual recognition, @Word of God the cause of creation, @power and sovereignty of God; omnipotence of God, @detachment; severance; renunciation; patience
